text: On initial survey, we could see phrenicopulmonary adhesions, which were stretched further by creating a pneumothorax of six millimeter mercury.

While dissecting the adhesions, care was taken to maintain a safe distance from the lung parenchyma to avoid the development of phrenicopulmonary, bronchopulmonary fistula.
